_INSTRUCTIONS: Fill in your supply network using your Scenario Card. Define where drugs are made, where they are stored, and how they move.

depots._comment: TODO: A depot is a regional warehouse or distribution centre. Fill in your primary depot.
capabilities: TODO — ambient OR refrigerated OR frozen

depots._comment: TODO: Add a second depot if your study ships to two regions (optional — delete this block if only one depot)
capabilities: TODO — ambient OR refrigerated OR frozen

manufacturing_sites._comment: TODO: Where are the investigational drugs manufactured/packaged? Fill in your manufacturing site.
produces: TODO — item_id of first item e.g. ITEM-001
TODO — item_id of second item e.g. ITEM-002

shipping_lanes._comment: TODO: A shipping lane is a regular route from one location to another. Fill in at least one lane from your manufacturer to your depot.
shipping_lanes.origin: TODO — must match a site_id from manufacturing_sites above e.g. MFG-UK
shipping_lanes.destination: TODO — must match a depot_id from depots above e.g. DP-US
shipping_lanes.lead_time_days: TODO — e.g. 7 (how many days does this shipment typically take?)
shipping_lanes.lane_type: TODO — air OR sea OR road OR courier
shipping_lanes.description: TODO — optional e.g. Weekly air freight

country_depot_assignments._comment: TODO: Map each country from study_config.json to the depot that serves it
country_depot_assignments.country_code: TODO — must match a country in study_config.json
country_depot_assignments.depot_id: TODO — must match a depot_id above

country_depot_assignments._comment: TODO: Add one entry per country in your study
country_depot_assignments.depot_id: TODO — depot that serves this country
